creator: crapsh@monkeybrains.net
text:
When a bridge is created, the default timeout is 1200, not 240 as stated 
 in the documentation.

Fix: 

Change the man page!  Also, the default for maxaddr is indeed 100, per 
 the man page.  In these modern times with
 many internet devices, the value should be 2000 IMHO.
